plugins.name: meta
plugins.description: How to build a great skills marketplace and its plugins (plugin-dev): repo layout, the Claude + Codex dual-manifest packaging, version discipline, and what makes a plugin/skill worth installing. The same SKILL.md files back the Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: home-it
plugins.description: Home IT skills. check-network: a repeatable playbook to diagnose a slow home network end-to-end (measure throughput / bufferbloat / packet loss / Wi-Fi signal, localize the bottleneck across ISP plan → router → Wi-Fi path → client, inspect the router UI) and rank fixes — wired backhaul first, a second wireless extender never. The same SKILL.md files back the Claude Code plugin.
